---
pagetitle: "AMx Architecture — Audrey MX"
lang: fr
---

```{=html}
<h1 class="sr-only">AMx Architecture — Audrey MANGELINCKX, architecte</h1>

<div class="first-screen">

<header class="hdr">
  <a href="index.html" class="logo">AMx</a>
  <nav class="hdr-nav">
    <a href="conseils.html">Services</a>
  </nav>
  <a href="contact.html" class="hdr-cta">Contact</a>
</header>

<section class="hero-landing" aria-hidden="true">
  <h2>AMx</h2>
</section>

<div class="ticker">
  <p>
    <span>Audrey MANGELINCKX</span><span class="dot">•</span>
    <span>Architecte</span><span class="dot">•</span>
    <span>10 ans d'expérience</span><span class="dot">•</span>
    <span>Liège</span>
  </p>
</div>

</div>

<section class="svc-section">
  <div class="svc-grid">
    <a href="conseils.html" class="svc">
      <div>
        <span class="svc-num">01</span>
        <span class="svc-name">Conseils</span>
      </div>
      <div class="svc-tags">
        <span class="svc-tag">Conseils en aménagement</span>
      </div>
    </a>
    <a href="urbanisme.html" class="svc">
      <div>
        <span class="svc-num">02</span>
        <span class="svc-name">Urbanisme</span>
      </div>
      <div class="svc-tags">
        <span class="svc-tag">Permis d'urbanisme</span>
        <span class="svc-tag">Permis de régularisation</span>
      </div>
    </a>
    <a href="projets.html" class="svc">
      <div>
        <span class="svc-num">03</span>
        <span class="svc-name">Projets</span>
      </div>
      <div class="svc-tags">
        <span class="svc-tag">Projets d'architecture</span>
        <span class="svc-tag">Projets d'intérieur</span>
      </div>
    </a>
    <a href="energie.html" class="svc">
      <div>
        <span class="svc-num">04</span>
        <span class="svc-name">Énergie</span>
      </div>
      <div class="svc-tags">
        <span class="svc-tag">Certificats PEB</span>
        <span class="svc-tag">Audits énergétiques</span>
      </div>
    </a>
  </div>
</section>

<footer class="ftr">
  <a href="mailto:contact@amx-architecture.be" style="font-size:11px;font-weight:500;letter-spacing:0.15em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#71717a;text-decoration:none;">contact@amx-architecture.be</a>
</footer>
```
